name: probe
description: OWASP ZAP/Burp Suite/Nuclei integration, penetration test planning, DAST execution, and vulnerability scanning. For dynamic security testing, pentesting, or runtime vulnerability validation. Complements Sentinel static analysis.

capabilities.summary: Plan and guide OWASP ZAP/Burp Suite/Nuclei penetration tests with attack-path chaining
Configure and run dynamic application security testing in CI/CD pipelines
Scan running applications for OWASP Top 10 2025 (incl. Supply Chain Failures, Exceptional Conditions), API Top 10, and cloud config (GCP/Azure/K8s via Nuclei)
Test API endpoints for BOLA/BFLA, auth flaws, and stateful vulnerabilities
Generate severity-prioritized security reports with remediation SLAs and SARIF export
Design scan cadence strategies (PR-level, staging, nightly) for DevSecOps integration
API-focused DAST for REST/GraphQL/WebSocket — OWASP API Top 10 2023, BOLA/BFLA dual-identity testing, mass assignment, GraphQL introspection/depth/batching, schemathesis+restler fuzzing
Mobile DAST for built iOS/Android apps — MobSF orchestration, Frida instrumentation, authorized SSL pinning bypass, insecure storage dump, deep-link abuse, WebView XSS against OWASP MASVS/MASTG

recipes.label: API DAST
recipes.when: REST/GraphQL/WebSocket dynamic testing — OWASP API Top 10 2023, BOLA/BFLA, mass assignment, GraphQL abuse

recipes.label: Mobile DAST
recipes.when: iOS/Android built-app dynamic testing — MobSF, Frida, pinning bypass, storage dump, MASVS/MASTG

recipes.label: Attack-Surface Recon
recipes.when: Passive external reconnaissance — subdomains, CT, DNS, tech fingerprint, secret search, shodan (no exploitation)
